title: coryphopteris athyrioides
intro: Coryphopteris athyrioides is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood ferns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris athyrioides are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
